title: Israeli drone strikes kill at least 4 in Lebanon, Iran threatens to respond

snapshot.title: Israeli drone strikes kill at least 4 in Lebanon, Iran threatens to respond
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Israeli drone strikes targeted three vehicles in southern Lebanon on Tuesday, killing at least four people and wounding others, Lebanon’s National News Agency (NNA) reported. Iran's military threatened to respond to the strikes despite a deal between Tehran and Washington ending the Middle East war, including in Lebanon.
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Israeli drone strikes kill at least 4 in Lebanon, Iran threatens to respond | Arab News
